description: Capability-gated Gerrit code review tools with opt-in review notifications pushed into the session
name: team.gaijin/go-gerrit-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Gerrit instance
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP password or token of the account
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated capability groups to enable: read, comment, transition
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_GROUPS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Gerrit project allowlist confining every operation
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_PROJECTS

environmentVariables.description: Refuse trail-leaving operations on changes not owned by the authenticated account
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_OWN_CHANGES_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Enable review notifications: poll Gerrit for activity on subscribed changes and push it into the agent's session (requires a client with channel support)
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_REVIEW_NOTIFICATIONS

environmentVariables.description: Poll cadence for subscribed changes, as a Go duration
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_REVIEW_NOTIFICATIONS_POLL_INTERVAL

environmentVariables.description: Keep the authenticated account's own activity in review notifications
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_REVIEW_NOTIFICATIONS_INCLUDE_OWN

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated usernames or numeric account IDs whose activity never becomes a review notification
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_REVIEW_NOTIFICATIONS_EXCLUDE_ACCOUNTS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated regular expressions; matching message or comment text never becomes a review notification
environmentVariables.name: GERRIT_MCP_REVIEW_NOTIFICATIONS_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS

title: Gerrit Code Review
